pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.intro: How Alpha Digital Solutions collects, uses and protects your personal information, and the rights you have over it under Canadian privacy law.
pages.metaDescription: How Alpha Digital Solutions collects, uses, shares and protects your personal information under PIPEDA — and how to exercise your privacy rights.

sections.heading: Who we are
body: Alpha Digital Solutions is an SEO and digital-marketing agency based in Toronto, Ontario, and is the organization responsible for the personal information collected through this website and in the course of providing our services. If you have any questions about this policy or how we handle your data, email us at contact@alphadigitalsol.com or write to Suite 785, 1/2-145, Unit 5, Church Street, Toronto, Ontario, M5B 1Y4, Canada.

sections.heading: Information we collect
body: We collect personal information in two ways:
bullets: Information you give us — your name, email, phone number, website URL and the focus area you choose when you contact us, request a free SEO audit, or become a client.
Information we collect automatically — your IP address, browser type, the pages you visit and similar technical data, gathered through cookies and website analytics.

sections.heading: How we use your information
body: We use your personal information to respond to your enquiries and prepare a free audit or proposal; to deliver our SEO and digital-marketing services such as technical SEO, content, link building, local SEO and community/answer-engine optimization; to send agreed reporting and updates; and to operate, secure and improve our website.

We rely on your consent under PIPEDA to collect, use and disclose your personal information, and we handle it in line with the ten fair-information principles. By contacting us or requesting an audit you consent to the use of your information for these purposes; you may withdraw consent at any time.

sections.heading: Sharing your information
body: We never sell your personal information. We share it only where necessary — with the form and email provider that delivers your messages, the web-analytics provider that measures site usage, and our hosting provider that stores the site and its data. Any service provider that processes data on our behalf is bound by strict confidentiality and data-protection obligations and may only use it to provide that service.

sections.heading: How long we keep it
body: We keep personal information only for as long as necessary for the purposes set out above and to meet our legal and business obligations. Enquiry and audit-request details are kept while we are in contact and for a reasonable period afterwards; client records are retained for the duration of our engagement and a limited time thereafter, then securely deleted.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: Under PIPEDA you have the right to access the personal information we hold about you and to request a correction if it is inaccurate or incomplete. You may also withdraw your consent to our use of your information, subject to legal or contractual limits. To exercise any of these rights, email contact@alphadigitalsol.com.
You also have the right to complain to the Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC) at priv.gc.ca if you are unhappy with how we have handled your personal information.

sections.heading: Cookies, security and changes
body: Our website uses cookies — please see our Cookie Policy for details. We use appropriate technical and organizational measures to keep your information secure. This policy is governed by the laws of the Province of Ontario and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein. We may update it from time to time; the date above shows when it was last reviewed.

pages.title: Terms of Use
pages.intro: The terms on which you may use the Alpha Digital Solutions website. Our services to clients are governed separately by our written engagement or service agreement.
pages.metaDescription: The terms governing your use of the Alpha Digital Solutions website, including intellectual property, disclaimers and limitation of liability.

sections.heading: About these terms
body: These terms govern your use of the Alpha Digital Solutions website. By using the site you accept them in full. The SEO and digital-marketing services we provide to clients are governed separately by our written engagement or service agreement, not by these website terms.

sections.heading: Using our website
body: You may use this website for lawful purposes only. You must not misuse it, attempt to gain unauthorized access to it, or use it in any way that could damage or impair the site or another user's enjoyment of it.

sections.heading: Our services and results
body: We deliver SEO and digital marketing — technical SEO, content, link building, local SEO and community/answer-engine optimization — on a project or monthly-retainer basis, with deliverables set out in your service agreement.

Search engines control their own rankings, so we do not and cannot guarantee specific keyword positions, traffic volumes or revenue. The content on this website is general information only and is not a promise of any particular result.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: All content on this website — including text, graphics, logos and design — belongs to Alpha Digital Solutions or its licensors and is protected by copyright. You may not reproduce, distribute or republish it without our written permission. Ownership of deliverables we create for clients is dealt with in the relevant service agreement.

sections.heading: Links and third parties
body: Where we link to third-party websites we do so for convenience only; we are not responsible for their content, availability or privacy practices.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
body: This website is provided "as is" and "as available". To the fullest extent permitted by law, we exclude all liability for any loss or damage arising from your use of, or inability to use, the site. Nothing in these terms limits our liability where it would be unlawful to do so.

sections.heading: Governing law and changes
body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Province of Ontario and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein, and any disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Ontario. We may update these terms from time to time. If you have any questions, contact us at contact@alphadigitalsol.com.

pages.title: Cookie Policy
pages.intro: What cookies are, how Alpha Digital Solutions uses them, and how you can manage them.
pages.metaDescription: How the Alpha Digital Solutions website uses cookies — the types we use, why we use them, and how to manage or disable them.

sections.heading: What are cookies?
body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They help the site work, remember your preferences, and tell us how the site is being used so we can improve it.

sections.heading: How we use cookies
body: We use cookies to:
bullets: Make the website function correctly (essential cookies that cannot be switched off).
Remember choices you make, such as functional preferences, to give you a better browsing experience.
Understand how visitors use the site — for example which pages are most popular — through analytics cookies, so we can improve it.

sections.heading: Managing cookies
body: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that blocking some cookies may affect how this website works. For more information on managing cookies, see aboutcookies.org or your browser's help pages.

sections.heading: Third-party cookies and changes
body: Some cookies may be set by third-party services we use, such as our web-analytics provider, which have their own privacy and cookie policies. We may update this policy as our use of cookies changes. Questions? Email contact@alphadigitalsol.com.
